title: Rootless "Please select an image" even though the image exists...
body:
* podman version 4.0.2
* rootless, same user
* CentOS Stream release 8

The image exists
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/6713988/177916687-5b509173-69e0-41bd-a841-af66faac170e.png)

When I try to run it:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/6713988/177916712-0844c8cf-1697-411c-8174-4f1adde92461.png)

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @alexisfrjp.

podman does not match `yt` because the tag of the local image is `707b1fb`. If you run `yt:707b1fb` or retag the image, it will work.
